item.title: D-cut：用于批量推测解码的自适应验证深度修剪
item.summary: arXiv:2607.14647v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model (LLM) inference without compromising output quality. Recent parallel drafting methods further improve single-request performance by decoupling draft length from drafting latency, enabling longer drafts and higher mean
